description_long: This is a three-seater couch upholstered in a dark brown, slightly glossy leather or leather-like material. The couch features three distinct seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be attached and have a boxy, squared-off shape. The armrests are wide, straight, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the couch a modern, blocky silhouette. The back of the couch is fully covered in the same material, with subtle paneling visible. No legs are visible, suggesting a low-profile or hidden base. The overall appearance is robust and suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A dark brown, boxy three-seater couch with attached seat and back cushions, wide straight armrests, and a slightly glossy leather-like finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, wide straight armrests, and the full seating area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the armrest and the thickness of the back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, paneled backrest and the absence of visible legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest and the profile of the back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three seat cushions and three backrest cushions, all boxy and attached, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown with a slightly glossy, smooth leather-like texture and subtle natural marbling.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or low-profile base integrated into the frame.
attribute_armrest_design: Wide, straight, and flat armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered in matching material.
attribute_backrest_type: High, divided into three attached, boxy cushions, matching the seat cushions in material and style.
